title: selaginella presliana
intro: Selaginella presliana, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Selaginella presliana include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a powder, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects and interactions.
